subcodes.first_line: O Phoenix of the fire of God's love! For some time now have the birds of the meadow ceased their melodious singing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نیران محبت الله چندیست مرغان چمن از غزلخانی باز مانده اند این از
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
